sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Minthang Kumpi phat un, Amah bek Psian,
Na lamdang lian hong lahkhiat manin phat ni;
Zan a
meikhuam tawh lam hong makaih Pasian,
Sun a meiikhuam tawh hong pi Pasian phat
ni.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Vantung mite’n phat un, Kham gawmsem tumin;
A mite’n zong kunin,
A mai-ah bia un;
A gam lianpi sungah, Kum tawn, khang tawnin,
A bawlsate’n phat un, A
bawlsate’n phat un,
Abawlsate’n phat un, ke’n zong ka phat
ding.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khawnkhong tatna hong pia, phat ni, i Pasian,
Sapna teng hong luanna tuinak hi,
phat ni;
Phat ni hong it hong kem, a migi Pasian,
I thungetnate hong dawng Pasian phat
ni.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Eite hong it mana, hong ze-et Pasian,
Amah tawh hong kinaizaw sak Pasian phat
ni;
Upna, lawpna hang gualzo sak Pasian,
It le ngaih teng tawh hong gawm Pasian phat ni.
